SC-001: Verify: User can add a product to the cart from the product detail page and see the cart item count update
SC-002: Verify: User can open the cart dropdown and see the list of added items with their names and prices
SC-003: Verify: User can navigate to the Laptops product catalog and see a grid of product listings
SC-004: Verify: User can apply a manufacturer brand filter from the sidebar to narrow product results
SC-005: Verify: User can click a product thumbnail to open its detail page and see the product name and price
SC-006: Verify: User can browse the homepage and product listings without logging in as a guest
SC-007: Verify: User can search for a product by name using the search bar and see relevant results
SC-008: Verify: User can register a new account by filling in first name last name email telephone and password fields
SC-009: Verify: User can log in with a registered email address and password and land on the account dashboard
SC-010: Verify: User can log out from the account and be redirected to the home page
SC-011: Verify: User can remove an item from the shopping cart and see the cart update with the item gone
SC-012: Verify: User can update the quantity of an item in the shopping cart and see the line total recalculate
SC-013: Verify: User can sort products by price low to high and see the listing order change
SC-014: Verify: User can add a product to the wish list from the product detail page and view it in the wishlist
SC-015: Verify: User can complete a guest checkout by entering a shipping address and selecting flat rate shipping
